description: wave-2 spine-misc quantity/standard port on the shared kernel v1.3 + wave-1 shared log-family store. The `standard` quantity type is genuinely label-only: an empty QuantityType subclass whose fields (measure/value/units/label) are all base fields of the core quantity entity, already folded by the shared store. No new event kind, computed field, constraint, or workflow. Official numerics (yield_total, log_count) are confirmed-only per the bound pending-status-gates decision (the one chosen divergence), surfaced via pending-only partners.
